today.prep_notes: Review GDCU-8893 description and acceptance criteria before the session. Have the Claude prototype ready (https://serene-noether-kjguwuj65-mike-s-personal.vercel.app/). Ciara Carroll is back from Monday leave today — consider looping her in to demo her work. action_items.action: Prepare and confirm time for Claude Design System walkthrough with Colin Brannigan — Colin asked yesterday (2026-04-27 15:00 BST) to be run through 'what to do with the design system in Claude' today. Mike replied 'Np' but no time was set. Confirm time, prepare demo using GDCU-8893 deliverables, and decide whether to include Ciara Carroll.

Unblock GDCU-8619 Operator List Redesign — Ciara Carroll's ticket has been Blocked and In Product since 2026-04-16 (now 12 days). Ciara was on leave Monday and is back today. Use today as the opportunity to have a direct conversation, identify the specific blocker, and resolve or escalate. Every day of delay blocks Ciara's sprint output.

Review and sign off GDCU-8893 Gambling.com Design System (Ciara Carroll, Highest priority, In Product, updated 2026-04-27) — directly tied to today's Colin walkthrough. Review the 5 requirements: design tokens, Figma plugin, Claude plugin, MD knowledge files, and AI usage guidelines. Accepted criteria: single-prompt project creation in Claude Projects.

Review and sign off GDCU-8546 Tinder Style Offer Match (Jessica Dordevic, In Product, updated 2026-04-27) — Mike reviewed and was happy ('I'm happy with it', 2026-04-27 13:46 BST). Jessica confirmed placeholder branding and naming via DM. Scope: Tinder-style swipe widget with 3-5 question onboarding, card stack UI, Quick Match mode. Ready for formal sign-off and dev handoff.

Review GDCU-8870 Performance Improvements for Page Timeouts (Nebojsa Stanic, In Product, updated 2026-04-27) — new In Product entry not present in yesterday's report. Investigates 28-second page timeouts affecting MrCurl workflow across multiple US market URLs. Accepted criteria is either a timeout reduction or a blocker report for escalation. Mike's sign-off needed.

Review and sign off GDCU-8512 Always On Betting Tips Page (Miguel Migneco, In Product since 2026-04-23, now 5 days) — mobile-first Betting Tips Hub with live tip cards, sport navigation, Matrix widget integration, and operator offers module. Stakeholders include Colin Brannigan, Dean Ryan, Dan Smullen, Chloe Christie. Overdue for Mike's review.

Vic Dadson medical leave midpoint check — Vic was signed off for a fortnight on 2026-04-21 (due back ~2026-05-05). Now at day 7. The Data Engineering alignment with Nemanja discussed with Mike and David has not yet been actioned. Plan coverage and prepare for Vic's return meeting.

Follow up with Jessica Dordevic on Chloe Christie's naming convention request — Chloe asked for the Origins logo naming convention to be confirmed in Figma for GDCU-8694 (now Done). Mike asked Jessica to 'sync up with Chloe' at 16:13 BST yesterday. Confirm this was resolved before ticket is formally closed.

Verify GDCU-8792 Cloudflare Bot Management status — was Blocked in QA in Friday's report but no longer appears in the blocked list today. Confirm whether the blocker was cleared or the ticket was moved.

Note: Novica Vukobratovic was sick on Monday 2026-04-27 (#gdc-pod 07:08 BST) but still completed GDCU-8840 (Instagram Headers Widget NZ). Confirm he is back today and that GDCU-8842 (Genesis Content Layouts, In QA, Harden Thomas Wallace) is progressing on schedule.

completed_48h.summary: [GDC][DEV][ALL GEOS] Desktop PSI blocked by geo-redirect race condition
completed_48h.note: Fixed inline redirect firing before isGooglePageSpeedInsightsAgent() is defined. 78+ URLs across US, UK, SE, RO, NZ, NO, IE markets unblocked for desktop PSI audits.

completed_48h.summary: [GDC][DEV] Investigate & Fix Incorrect Ktag CT Value on Gambling.com Operator Pages
completed_48h.note: 40+ operator pages corrected from oplistclk to cta click tracking. Click attribution accuracy restored across all affected markets.

completed_48h.summary: [GDC][DEV][ALL GEOS] Add Logic for Offer Terms Static or Scrollable
completed_48h.note: Bet365 gets static T&Cs on all UK oplists; all other brands get scrollable T&Cs. Regulatory compliance restored.
Instagram-style oplist A/B test live on NZ no-deposit pages. 10 operator logos with popup offers and timer cycling.

completed_48h.summary: [GDC][DEV] Apply an Event Tag for Cosmo Spins/Slot Tournament Games
completed_48h.note: Bloomreach-accessible events now fire when users exhaust Cosmo Spins and Slots Tournament credits. CRM workflow can now be built by Shaun Cronin / Simon Merner.

completed_48h.summary: [GDC][DEV] Set Up Dynamic Content API (Cloudflare Workers + D1 + GDC Admin Panel)
completed_48h.note: Backend API for mobile app dynamic content complete. Four endpoints live: /api/banners, /api/offers, /api/config, /api/featured-game. Admin panel built for non-technical content management.
New image carousel size delivered. Mike reviewed and approved. Naming convention for Origins logo confirmed with Chloe Christie.
